Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and featured inventory from the live website.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects up-to-date product availability and pricing, eliminating manual catalog checks and reducing outdated-offer complaints.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates personalized marketing email copy including subject lines, body content, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts brand voice and current product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces high-quality, on-brand email content daily without copywriter involvement, saving hours of creative work and enabling consistent send cadence.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the appropriate contact lists, and triggers the scheduled send via the Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full email build-and-send process within HubSpot, ensuring daily campaigns reach segmented audiences without manual setup or scheduling.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, promotions, and inventory details from the live DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Guarantees that email content features accurate, current product information, reducing manual research and preventing promotion of out-of-stock items.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates daily marketing email content including subject lines, body copy, and calls-to-action aligned with DFC's brand identity and product catalog.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates the daily copywriting bottleneck, enabling consistent high-volume email output while maintaining DFC brand standards.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Builds the marketing email in HubSpot, targets the designated DFC contact lists, and sends the campaign via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates campaign creation and delivery, ensuring DFC audiences receive daily emails on schedule without manual HubSpot interaction.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves new and open support tickets from the R1 Concepts HubSpot pipeline, including ticket details, customer history, and associated contact records.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests in real time so the AI can process them immediately, reducing first-response time significantly.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (e.g., returns, fitment, shipping) and drafts a context-aware reply using customer history and DFC product knowledge.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Automates ticket triage and response drafting, enabling the support team to review and send replies in seconds instead of writing each one from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, attaches the draft reply as a note, and adjusts the pipeline stage for agent review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot with enriched ticket data, allowing agents to approve and send responses without context-switching.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contact properties, including reason codes and order details.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all Amazon customer issue data from HubSpot in one automated pull, eliminating the need for manual export or report generation.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue data into a structured Google Sheet with organized columns for trend analysis, filtering, and team review.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Provides the team with a live, shareable analysis dashboard that updates automatically, enabling fast identification of recurring product or fulfillment issues.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals on the R1 website, such as page views, product browsing, and form interactions tied to known contacts.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals the moment they occur, giving the sales team actionable leads instead of waiting for customers to reach out.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alert messages to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channels and email with customer details and activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up on warm leads, dramatically reducing response time and increasing the chance of converting active browsing into orders.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent embedded on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions, order inquiries, and fitment lookups in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will deflect routine support inquiries from the ticket queue and provide instant 24/7 assistance, improving customer experience and reducing support team workload.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will process customer queries using AI against product catalog and order data, generating accurate responses and escalating complex issues to human agents.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant, knowledgeable product and order support without human intervention for the majority of inquiries, scaling support capacity at minimal cost.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the specified niche or campaign criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide discovery net across the open web, surfacing creators that platform-only searches would miss and broadening the potential partnership pool.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves detailed creator profiles, subscriber/follower counts, engagement metrics, and recent content from YouTube, Instagram, and Google surfaces.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Enriches each discovered creator with quantitative performance data, enabling objective comparison and eliminating hours of manual profile research.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data to assess relevance, audience alignment, and content quality, then compiles a ranked shortlist of discovery results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw data into an actionable ranked list of potential creator partners, reducing days of manual research into minutes of AI-powered analysis.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, content quality, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Provides an objective, repeatable qualification framework that ensures only high-potential creators advance to outreach, saving the team from pursuing low-value partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines from Google Drive to inform AI-generated messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures all outreach is grounded in proven sequences and brand-approved messaging, maintaining consistency and improving response rates.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, adjusting tone, offer details, and talking points per creator profile.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized outreach at scale without manual drafting, dramatically increasing the volume of creators contacted while maintaining a human-quality touch.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails from the designated Gmail account and tracks delivery and open status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the actual send process and creates a trackable record of all outreach, enabling systematic follow-up and pipeline management.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies to outreach emails, capturing response content, sentiment, and conversation thread context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides the AI with full conversation history for contextually accurate follow-ups.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer negotiation emails, conversation patterns, and approved deal terms from Google Drive to guide the AI response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every AI reply in real negotiation precedent, ensuring responses align with proven strategies and approved partnership terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts contextual reply emails using learned negotiation tactics, previous conversation history, and approved deal parameters to advance the creator relationship.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles multi-turn creator negotiations autonomously, reducing the team's email workload while maintaining strategic consistency across all creator conversations.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation reply within the existing email thread and logs the interaction for future learning.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps creator conversations moving without delays, ensuring timely responses that maintain creator interest and accelerate deal closure.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying products.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability guides, ensuring every qualifying part is captured without human error.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Generates a formatted DFC load sheet and sales sheet from the matched data, ready for distribution.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails tailored to DFC's First to Market branding.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including contact counts, deal pipeline data, and email engagement stats for the reporting period.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes keyword performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts trails competitors in search rankings.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the week's Super Session Saturday content and download link.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Fetches the latest weekly R1 Concepts video including URL, title, description, and transcript.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and CTR data for all DFC blog posts generated by the SEO agent.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Receives Mark's vehicle spec submission (make, model, year, etc.) via a HubSpot form and cross-references it against the DFC product catalog.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order items, and in-transit shipments for all parts on the backorder report.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo online catalogs to compile make/model/year fitment data for two-piece rotors.
